docs.title: 可积系统研究简报
docs.text:
本页显示最近三天的 AI 辅助研究简报，最新日期在最上方。简报面向 Ling Liming 课题组相关方向，重点关注可积系统中的精确解与特殊背景、稳定性与动力学机制、IST/RHP 与渐近分析。

本周归档 · 全部归档

AI 生成说明

简报主要依据题名、摘要、arXiv 分类、关键词和公开元数据筛选。条目分级表示相关性和阅读优先级，不代表对论文正确性的审查。除特别标注外，条目尚未经过人工逐篇验证；数学结论请以原论文为准。

docs.title: [重点关注] Asymptotic analysis of N-elliptic localized solutions for the Fokas--Lenells equation
docs.text:
作者：Wang Tang；Guo-Fu Yu 来源：arXiv:2607.06409 标签：Fokas--Lenells equation, elliptic localized solutions, Darboux--Bäcklund transformation, Weierstrass elliptic functions

简评：这篇与课题组的 DNLS / Fokas--Lenells / 椭圆背景局域波方向高度贴近。摘要中明确使用 Lax pair、Weierstrass 椭圆函数和 N-fold Darboux--Bäcklund transformation 构造 N-elliptic localized solutions，并分析沿传播方向与传播方向之间的渐近行为，适合作为“椭圆背景 + Darboux + 渐近分析”的近期重点条目。

docs.title: [背景参考] Integrable full discretization of the multi-component short pulse equation
docs.text:
作者：Ayako Hori；Yuta Tanaka；Ken-ichi Maruno；Yasuhiro Ohta；Bao-Feng Feng 来源：arXiv:2607.04756 标签：multi-component short pulse equation, integrable discretization, soliton systems

简评：方程不是 NLS/DNLS，但“多分量 + 可积离散化 + short pulse”与课题组早期 complex short pulse、Darboux/局域波相关工作有外围联系。适合保留为多分量可积模型和离散化方向的背景条目。

docs.title: [背景参考] Sharp Upper Bound for Amplitudes of Finite-Gap Solutions of the Modified Korteweg-de Vries Equation
docs.text:
作者：Otis C. Wright 来源：arXiv:2607.01348 标签：finite-gap solutions, mKdV, amplitude bounds

简评：这篇偏有限带解的定量性质，不直接进入 DNLS/CNLS 主线，但与“特殊背景、有限带/椭圆函数解、可积方程显式结构”相关。可作为后续整理 finite-gap / elliptic background 阅读图谱时的候选。

docs.title: [已发表代表作 / 必读] Orbital stability of breathers for coupled nonlinear Schrödinger equations
docs.text:
作者：Liming Ling；Dmitry E. Pelinovsky；Huajie Su 来源：Advances in Mathematics 495 (2026), 110961 标签：coupled NLS, vector solitons, breathers, spectral stability, orbital stability, squared eigenfunctions

简评：这是本期最值得放入长期文献图谱的公开发表论文。文章研究 CNLS 中非退化 vector soliton 的谱稳定性和 breather 的 orbital stability，稳定性证明使用 Lyapunov 方法，并借助可积结构给出的 squared eigenfunctions。它正好连接了 coupled NLS 显式波、breather orbit、Krein signature、非线性稳定性等课题组核心线索。

docs.title: [观察] Spin-current-controlled anisotropic deformation of magnetic lump solitons
docs.text:
作者：Xiao-Qi Cui；Xin-Wei Jin；Shiyi Wang；Xiao-Yong Wen；Zhan-Ying Yang 来源：arXiv:2607.07345 标签：lump solitons, anisotropic deformation, magnetic solitons

简评：这篇属于物理驱动的 lump soliton 动力学，和 Ling 组的 NLS/DNLS/RHP 主线不直接重合，但“lump soliton + deformation”可作为非线性局域结构动力学的外围观察条目。

docs.title: [重点关注 / 必读候选] Asymptotics of Soliton Gas for the Derivative Nonlinear Schrödinger Equation
docs.text:
作者：Deng Shan Wang；Xinyu Wang 来源：arXiv:2606.24435 标签：DNLS, soliton gas, meromorphic RHP, continuum limit, ∂̄-problem, long-time asymptotics, theta functions

简评：这篇是 IST / RHP 与渐近分析栏目的强相关条目。它从 DNLS 的 reflectionless potential 和纯 N-soliton 解出发，经 meromorphic RHP 取 N→∞ 连续极限，得到描述 DNLS soliton gas 的 ∂̄-problem，并进一步分析大 x 与长时间渐近。由于它同时涉及 DNLS、soliton gas、RHP、∂̄ 与 theta-function 渐近，是本期最贴近课题组分析方向的新增论文之一。

docs.title: [重点关注] Inverse scattering for the linear system associated with the coupled Gerdjikov--Ivanov equations
docs.text:
作者：Ramazan Ercan 来源：arXiv:2605.28856 标签：coupled Gerdjikov--Ivanov equations, DNLS system III, inverse scattering, Jost solutions, scattering coefficients, Marchenko integral equations

简评：这篇直接面向 coupled Gerdjikov--Ivanov equations 相关线性系统的 direct/inverse scattering。摘要中明确涉及两个 Schwartz-class potentials、Jost solutions、scattering coefficients、bound states 与 Marchenko 型积分方程；它与多分量 / 耦合 DNLS 谱问题和反散射构造高度相关，应优先进入 DNLS hierarchy 与 coupled derivative NLS 的文献候选表。

docs.title: 其他入口
docs.text:
• 本周归档: 保存本周每日简报的完整记录。
  • 全部归档: 按周回看历史简报。
  • Resources / 资源: selected courses, lecture notes, homepages, and search links.
  • Group work / 课题组相关: local research context, public notes, and group-facing links.
  • Core topics / 核心主题: current scope of the guide.
  • About / 关于: curation policy, design references, and license notes.

docs.title: About / 关于
docs.text:
This project is a small research-oriented guide for integrable systems and related methods.

这是一个小型研究向资料入口，主要服务于可积系统、反散射、黎曼-希尔伯特方法、非线性波和相关课题组资料整理。

docs.title: Curation policy / 策展原则
docs.text:
Keep the guide short. Prefer stable course pages, lecture notes, researcher homepages, search links, and public group materials over long unreviewed lists.

A useful entry should make clear why the link is included. If the reason is not yet clear, keep it in a candidate section or leave it out.

docs.title: Design references / 设计参考
docs.text:
The site structure is inspired by public learning-guide and knowledge-map projects, especially their clean navigation and use-case-oriented layout.

  • CS 自学指南
  • 清华大学数学课程学习指南 / MathLoveYou
  • 目录 - 小时百科

This project differs in scope: it is narrower, research-oriented, and maintained around integrable systems and local group needs.

docs.title: Comments / 评论
docs.text: Comments may be added later via Giscus after GitHub Discussions is enabled.

docs.title: License / 许可证
docs.text:
Original site content and annotations are licensed under CC BY-SA 4.0. Code, scripts, configuration, and workflows are licensed under the MIT License.

External resources linked from this guide remain under their original authors' or publishers' terms.

docs.title: Analytics / 访问统计
docs.text:
This site uses GoatCounter for lightweight, privacy-friendly aggregate traffic statistics. It is used only to understand which pages are useful.

本站使用 GoatCounter 做轻量聚合访问统计，仅用于了解哪些页面更有用。

docs.title: Group work / 课题组相关
docs.text: Public links related to the local research group and shared notes. Keep this page as an entry point, not as a publication list.

docs.text:
• Homepage / 主页: 华南理工大学数学学院个人主页
  • MathSciNet: Liming Ling publications search
  • arXiv: author search
  • Google Scholar: search
  • Semantic Scholar: search

docs.title: Public notes / 公开笔记
docs.text: • Course notes repository: killlakill/courseNotes on Codeberg.

docs.title: Reading projects / 读书项目
docs.text: • To be added.

docs.title: Resources / 资源
docs.text: Selected external entry points for integrable systems, inverse scattering, Riemann-Hilbert methods, nonlinear waves, and related analysis. Keep this page short; use Git history or Zotero data for longer candidate lists.

docs.title: Learning resources / 课程、讲义与参考
Peter Perry — inverse scattering lectures
docs.text:
• Lectures page
  • Selected PDFs: Lecture 1, Lecture 2, Lecture 3, Lecture 4

docs.title: Peter D. Miller — RHP and integrable systems
docs.text:
• Homepage
  • Teaching archive
  • Math 651: Integrable Systems and Riemann-Hilbert Problems

docs.title: Percy Deift — RHP and nonlinear steepest descent
docs.text: • Riemann-Hilbert Problems

docs.title: PDE and analysis background
docs.text:
• Monica Visan: lecture notes
  • Michael Taylor: mathematical notes

docs.title: Researcher and resource pages / 研究者与专题入口
Core directions / 核心方向
docs.text:
• Peter Perry: inverse scattering, NLS/DNLS, DS II, lecture notes.
  • Peter D. Miller: RHP methods, asymptotics, integrable systems, rogue waves.
  • Dmitry Pelinovsky: DNLS, nonlinear waves, spectral stability, well-posedness.
  • Tom Trogdon: numerical RHP, notebooks, software, computational materials.

docs.title: Related background / 相关背景
docs.text:
• Monica Visan: nonlinear dispersive PDE.
  • Todd Kapitula: spectral and dynamical stability.
  • Mathew A. Johnson: nonlinear waves and stability.
  • Peter Olver: symmetry methods, PDE, mathematical software.

docs.title: Search and candidate links / 检索与待核查
docs.text:
• MathSciNet publications search
  • arXiv search
  • Google Scholar
  • Semantic Scholar

Candidate links should stay out of the main list until their mathematical relevance and link stability have been checked. Likely candidates include KIT/Xian Liao IST course pages, Fields workshop pages, finite-gap references, and selected Zotero-derived entries.

docs.title: Core topics / 核心主题
docs.text:
This page records the current scope of the guide. Detailed reading material belongs in Resources.

本页只说明当前范围，不展开成百科或完整自学路线。

docs.title: Methods / 方法
docs.text:
• Inverse scattering transform / 反散射变换
  • Riemann-Hilbert problems / 黎曼-希尔伯特问题
  • Nonlinear steepest descent / 非线性最速下降法
  • dbar steepest descent / dbar 最速下降法

docs.title: Model equations / 模型方程
docs.text:
• NLS, DNLS, coupled NLS
  • KdV, mKdV, and AKNS-type systems
  • Other integrable nonlinear wave equations as needed

docs.title: Nonlinear waves / 非线性波
docs.text:
• Solitons, breathers, and rogue waves / 孤子、呼吸子与怪波
  • Long-time asymptotics / 长时间渐近
  • Spectral and orbital stability / 谱稳定性与轨道稳定性

docs.title: Geometry and computation / 几何与计算
docs.text:
• Finite-gap and algebro-geometric methods / 有限带与代数几何方法
  • Riemann surfaces and theta functions / 黎曼曲面与 theta 函数
  • Numerical RHP and reproducible computation / 数值 RHP 与可复现实验

Create a separate topic page only after there is enough curated material to justify it.

docs.title: 简报归档
docs.text:
这里保存可积系统研究简报的周记录。首页显示最新每日简报，本页用于回看历史记录。

栏目范围

简报面向 Ling Liming 课题组相关方向，主要分为三类：精确解与特殊背景、稳定性与动力学机制、IST/RHP 与渐近分析。

返回首页

docs.title: 可积系统研究简报 · 2026-W28
docs.text:
本页为 AI 辅助生成的研究简报，主要面向 Ling Liming 课题组相关方向，跟踪可积系统、非线性波、精确解、稳定性、IST/RHP 与长时间渐近分析中的近期论文和研究线索。

筛选主要依据题名、摘要、arXiv 分类、关键词和公开元数据。条目分级表示相关性和阅读优先级，不代表对论文正确性的审查。除特别标注外，条目尚未经过人工逐篇验证；数学结论请以原论文为准。

本周文件用于连续记录每日发现。周末或每周整理时，可在本文顶部补充“本周重点关注”。

docs.text:
返回首页 · 本周归档 · 全部归档

AI 生成说明

本页为固定的最新简报入口。每日更新时，自动化流程应覆盖本页内容，并同时把同一批条目追加到本周归档文件。简报主要依据题名、摘要、分类、关键词和公开元数据筛选；条目分级表示相关性和阅读优先级，不代表对论文正确性的审查。
